title: Fruit Jelly Sticks Tik Tok
content_raw:
```html

Fruit Jelly Sticks has strawberry, orange, grape, mango, peach and pineapple flavours. And it adds lots of joy and happiness to the young and old. It is a great snack for the TikTok Challenge! Our stores have been waiting for the Jelly Fruits stock coming in. And all suppliers informed us it would be the end of the month. However, we just got Jelly Stick has one more flavour in-store now. The taste is great! Unfortunately, limited stock only.

Jelly Candy Challenge Fruit Jelly Sticks

It is individually wrapped and the weight is 20g each. This makes them perfect for party bags and lolly bag ideas, or you can find a full range of bulk lollies in Australia if you're looking to stock up for events and celebrations.

Frequently Asked Questions

What flavours do Fruit Jelly Sticks come in?

Fruit Jelly Sticks are available in six delicious flavours: strawberry, orange, grape, mango, peach, and pineapple. We've also just received a new flavour in-store, though stock is limited!

Are Fruit Jelly Sticks good for the TikTok challenge?

Yes! Fruit Jelly Sticks are a great snack for the TikTok Challenge and bring lots of joy and happiness to both young and old, making them perfect for viral candy challenges. They're also ideal for fun candy for kids in Australia.

How much does each Fruit Jelly Stick weigh and are they individually wrapped?

Each Fruit Jelly Stick is individually wrapped and weighs 20g, making them convenient for snacking or sharing.

Are Fruit Jelly Sticks currently in stock?

Yes, we currently have Fruit Jelly Sticks in stock, including a new flavour that just arrived. However, stock is limited, so we recommend ordering soon to avoid missing out.

Where can I buy Fruit Jelly Sticks?

You can purchase Fruit Jelly Sticks directly from our online store at sweetsworld.com.au by clicking the product link on this page.
```
